title: Demonic Battle Drum
content:
A mysterious item presented during the second/final round of the Demon General Competition. Whoever was able to strike the drum the most would win the competition.

Candidates who are born in the demon country and aim to secure a position as a commander-in-chief would have to pass this test.

The number of strikes a candidate makes + their foreign assistance (e.g. cultivators from the outside like 
Wang Lin
) would be tallied up.

Candidates that passed the first round of the competition should be able to strike the drum. However, what people weren't aware of was how powerful the backlash was.

The more one strikes the drum, the more powerful the backlash was. By the 8th strike, the strength of the backlash would be something a Ying Bian or 
Soul Transformation
 level cultivator would have trouble withstanding.

However, this drum was something that could enlighten a cultivator to ascend to the 
Ascendant
 Level (15 strikes) as this was an item that could resonate with the heavenly dao.
